sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57402" key="killobo/roi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιλλοβόροι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n57402.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κιλλίβαντες</ref> </xr> (in a chariot), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.143</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
